title: neurocallis scandens
intro: Neurocallis scandens, also known as the climbing neurocallis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Neurocallis scandens include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain, and fighting infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
